name: Couscous Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the cooked couscous.
2. Add the chopped green onions.
3. Mix in the chopped tomatoes.
4. Stir in the seeded and chopped cucumber.
5. Incorporate the cooked garbanzo beans.
6. Fold in the chopped parsley.
7. Mix gently until all ingredients are well combined.
8. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
